patch.value: Restore CI and Daily Release workflows removed by no-runner policy misapplication

ci.yml and release.yml restored from canonical pre-deletion versions (matching sibling packages); pm-web repo made public so Actions are free; npm catalog link corrected to scoped @unbrained/pm-web; typecheck/build/tests/audit/pack/changelog all green; daily release resumes.

value.author: codex
value.text: Root cause: commit e4ddf3c 'Align website repo with private no-runner policy' deleted .github/workflows/{ci,release,changelog}.yml. That policy applies to the WEBSITE repo (pm-cli-companion), not to pm-web, which is a distributable pm package that must build, test and auto-release like every sibling. Effect: Daily Release stopped after 2026-06-06; package stuck at 2026.6.4 on npm while the fleet moved to 2026.6.8/9. Fix: (1) made the repo public (history scanned, no secrets/PII), so Actions minutes are free; (2) restored ci.yml + release.yml from the canonical pre-deletion versions, which are byte-identical to sibling packages except for the repo URL; (3) corrected the pm catalog npm link to the scoped @unbrained/pm-web. Verified locally: typecheck, full build, 30/30 tests, 0 vulns, clean pack dry-run, changelog up-to-date.
